extortion.description: Specialized through our various companies in the manufacture and distribution of automotive textile accessories, (DBS Car Covers, JCDezarnaud) adult bedding and childcare accessories (SweetHome) and Personal protective equipment (Manusweet and Foxter). The Sweetco Group distributes all of its brands and private label products through its many customers car manufacturers, GSS, supermarkets, wholesalers or e-commerce playersgroupesweetco.com
